name: cloudiqus-delivery
description: Technical delivery — FinOps, WAFR, security, migration, onboarding, MSP managed services, incident response.

skills.name: finops-review
skills.description: FinOps review methodology for CloudiQS MSP customers. Monthly Value Report format, quick win tiers, expansion signal rules. All figures in GBP.

skills.name: incident-response
skills.description: CloudiQS cloud security incident response — detection, containment, investigation, remediation, and post-incident review. Based on AWS security incident response best practices.

skills.name: managed-services
skills.description: CloudiQS MSP service delivery rhythm — daily, weekly, monthly operations using MontyCloud DAY2. SLA definitions, escalation paths, and customer review cadence.

skills.name: migration-plan
skills.description: Cloud migration planning — 6R framework, VMware/Broadcom angle, phased approach, MAP funding model, TCO comparison. Always checks MAP eligibility.

skills.name: onboarding
skills.description: CloudiQS 30-day customer onboarding programme. First win by Day 21. First Value Report by Day 30. Structured to maximise early customer satisfaction and reduce churn risk.

skills.name: security-check
skills.description: CloudiQS cloud security assessment framework. IAM audit, GuardDuty, Security Hub, encryption, network posture. Produces risk-rated findings and remediation plan.

skills.name: wafr-run
skills.description: Well-Architected Framework Review methodology. All 6 pillars, 5-business-day credit submission rule, credit value by scope, and Partner Portal checklist.

skills.name: well-architected-pillars
skills.description: Reference guide to all 6 AWS Well-Architected Framework pillars — key principles, design questions, and CloudiQS-specific recommendations for each.

commands.name: finops-review
commands.description: Run a full CloudiQS FinOps review for a customer AWS account. Produces Monthly Value Report in GBP.

commands.name: incident
commands.description: Run the CloudiQS incident response process for a cloud security or availability incident.

commands.name: migration-plan
commands.description: Create a cloud migration plan — 6R framework, VMware angle, MAP funding, TCO comparison.

commands.name: onboard
commands.description: Create a 30-day customer onboarding plan. First win by Day 21. First Value Report by Day 30.

commands.name: security-check
commands.description: Run a CloudiQS security posture assessment — IAM, detection, network, data protection. Risk-rated findings.

commands.name: wafr
commands.description: Run a CloudiQS WAFR — all 6 pillars, findings, remediation plan, credit claim checklist. 5-day submission rule.
